dotnet-10-async-zip.title: .NET 10 Async Zip APIs
dotnet-10-async-zip.shortDescription: Discover the new asynchronous APIs for ZIP compression and performance improvements in .NET 10

content.mainTitle: Zip and GZip Asynchronous API Improvements in .NET 10
content.summary: The asynchronous APIs for ZIP compression and decompression in .NET 10 improve application performance and responsiveness.
content.intro: .NET 10 introduces new asynchronous APIs for working with ZIP archives and significantly improves the performance of compression and decompression operations, especially for large archives and concatenated GZip streams.

list.async: New async methods for non-blocking operations
list.performance: Better async I/O performance and parallelized extraction
list.gzip: Optimized support for concatenated GZip streams
list.memory: Reduced memory usage and better buffer reuse
list.noBreaking: No breaking changes - existing code automatically benefits from optimizations

newApis.title: New asynchronous APIs
newApis.description: .NET 10 adds several highly requested asynchronous methods:

gzip.title: Reading concatenated GZip files
gzip.description: GZip can contain multiple concatenated members. .NET 10 handles this more efficiently:
gzip.benefits: Smarter detection of GZip member boundaries, lower overhead when reading multiple blocks, and better async read performance.

list.cancellation: CancellationToken support for canceling long operations
list.responsive: More responsive applications with I/O-bound operations

list.parallel: Parallelized extraction for archives with many files
list.gzip: Improved native support for multi-member GZip files
